name: Tracking Drift: Variation-Aware Entropy Scheduling for Non-Stationary Reinforcement Learning
summary: arXiv:2601.19624v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Real-world reinforcement learning often faces environment drift, but most existing methods rely on static entropy coefficients/target entro...
description: arXiv:2601.19624v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Real-world reinforcement learning often faces environment drift, but most existing methods rely on static entropy coefficients/target entropy, causing over-exploration during stable periods and under-exploration after drift, and leaving unanswered the principled question of how exploration intensity should scale with drift magnitude. We...
author: Tongxi Wang, Zhuoyang Xia, Xinran Chen, Shan Liu
